title: diphasium decurrens
intro: Diphasium decurrens, also known as the bent-spike club moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Diphasium decurrens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
